originalAlarm.description: Undefined or garbage value returned to caller

sanitizedDescription: Undefined or garbage value returned to caller
reasoning: r is assigned at L18 (r = pfnnid_map[pfn]) from a globally initialized array before return (int)r at L21. r is always initialized on the path from L18 to L21. The alarm is a false positive from the desugared analysis, possibly arising from CSA not modeling assert() abort semantics correctly on the desugared path. PC = CONFIG_DISCONTIGMEM, no library macros.
